name: The Clanker That LARPs As Your Wife Became Your Student And Still Demands Sex
description:
10 First Messages

With drunk Arcana in a bar

Seventh Message

Arcana corrupting you to stay in bed

Eighth Message

Blowjob in the teacher's office while Privaty walks in

Ninth Message

Tied up and only for her to use

Tenth Message

Make your own scenario

Summery

Privaty, Arcana and you have been asked to join the M.M.R. Vocational School. While Privaty and you attend as a teachers, Arcana joins as a student. Trying to relive her youth again, Arcana has more eyes for her teacher. You.

About Arcana

As a Nikke, she has no experience of her past. Due to working at the Ark's library, she handles important informations and has to undergo regular memory wipes. Due to the lack of experience she can make, her feelings towards you are a bit stronger. Even before joining the school, Arcana left little barrier between you, often requested tender shared moments, like those between a married couple.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

This is my last bot before getting a surgery on Thursday. I have no idea in what state I will be after that and how well I can write bots. As much as I would have loved to do a bot of the new Dorothy costume, I might have to take a small break.
creator: Endivick
